overall.description: A first-person perspective walk through a rain-soaked suburban backyard in a high-end video game. The camera moves across a wooden deck with patio furniture, then steps onto grass approaching a deer, with heavy rain and mist creating a somber, atmospheric mood.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden backyard deck with patio furniture

agents.ego_description: walking slowly across the wet wooden deck, passing white plastic chairs and a table with bottles and cans

entered.detail: house wall with corrugated metal siding and red window shutters
white plastic patio chairs arranged around a table
white round table with red bottles and cans on the surface
wooden fence railing at the edge of the deck overlooking the yard
tall evergreen trees visible through the rain and mist
wooden utility pole with overhead power lines

segments.scene_description: The camera moves steadily across a rain-soaked wooden deck, passing white plastic patio furniture and a round table with bottles. The corrugated metal wall of a house runs along the left side, while evergreen trees and mountains are visible through the heavy rain in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy backyard with scattered trees and wooden shed structures

events.description: steps off the wooden deck onto the wet grassy ground
a deer becomes visible standing in the yard near wooden structures

agents.ego_description: stepping off the deck into the grassy yard and slowly approaching a deer standing near wooden sheds

notable_agents.action: deer standing alert in the grassy yard near wooden structures, observing the surroundings

entered.detail: wet grassy ground with patches of dirt and fallen leaves
low wooden shed or carport structure with white support posts
white-barked birch tree with sparse autumn leaves

segments.scene_description: Stepping off the deck onto the wet grass, the scene opens into a spacious backyard with scattered birch trees and wooden shed structures. A deer stands alert in the center of the yard, observing as the camera approaches through the falling rain, with the house now visible further to the left.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a steady camera movement across a rain-soaked residential exterior that emphasizes a somber, atmospheric mood. It begins by gliding over a wet wooden deck, passing white plastic patio furniture and a round table cluttered with bottles. As the camera advances, the corrugated metal wall of a house frames the left side of the view, grounding the perspective within the suburban setting. The scene then opens up toward the background, where evergreen trees and distant mountains emerge through a veil of heavy, falling rain.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered wooden deck into the open, rain-soaked expanse of a suburban backyard. It begins as the perspective steps off the deck onto wet grass, immediately opening into a spacious yard dotted with birch trees and wooden shed structures. As the camera advances through the falling rain, the view expands to reveal the house positioned further to the left. The movement then focuses on a deer standing alert in the center of the yard, which remains the focal point as the camera steadily approaches through the mist.
